records.ety: [F. mlilot, L. melilotus, fr. Gr. <?/, <?/, a kind of clover containing honey; me`li honey + <?/ lotus.]

defs: Any species of Melilotus, a genus of leguminous herbs having a vanillalike odor; sweet clover; hart's clover. The blue melilot (Melilotus caerulea) is used in Switzerland to give color and flavor to sapsago cheese.
